title: Floral Crunchy Saudi Kidney Beans Soup
description: A fragrant, protein‑rich soup with a hint of rose petals and mint, perfect for soothing hangover blues.
instructions: Rinse the soaked kidney beans and simmer them in fresh water for 45–60 minutes until tender. Drain and set aside.
Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add the diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the minced garlic, cumin, coriander, and turmeric; cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the vegetable broth, bring to a gentle simmer, then stir in the drained beans and simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
Fold in the chopped mint, dried rose petals, and toasted sesame seeds. Reduce heat, cover, and let the soup simmer for another 5 minutes to meld the flavors.
Remove the pot from the heat, stir in the lime juice, and season with salt and pepper to taste. Let the soup sit for 5 minutes before serving to allow the herbal notes to develop.
Ladle the soup into bowls, garnish with an extra sprinkle of toasted sesame seeds if desired, and serve hot.
